Idioma.LB_Mensaje: Execute values calculation and update Financial Report calculated
Idioma.LB_Mensaje1: (SOIN Financial Reports is required to update Financial Report calculated)
Idioma.LB_Mensaje2: Schedule values calculation for later execution
Idioma.LB_Mensaje3: (Calculated Financial Report can be update after calculation)
Idioma.LB_Mensaje4: There are no Financial Reports pending to send
Idioma.LB_Mensaje5: There are no Financial Reports in this group
Idioma.LB_Mensaje6: Calculation finished. Click here to consult the result
Idioma.LB_Mensaje7: Calculation not completed. Click Calculate to try again
Idioma.LB_Mensaje8: Request calculation has been scheduled. The request can be canceled using the list below
Idioma.LB_Distribuir: Send Financial Report Calculated After Update
Idioma.LB_OperacionesTipo3: Finished calculations that require update the financial report using Excel
Idioma.LB_OperacionesTipo4: Financial Reports that can not be sent
Idioma.LB_OperacionesTipo5: Financial Reports calculated in sending process
Idioma.BTN_Refrescar: Update Financial Report calculated using Excel SOIN Financial Reports
Idioma.BTN_EnviarCorreo: Send by eMail Financial Report calculated
